name: Operational Transparency Initiative
description: Deploy basic internal communications infrastructure across empire zones. Unlocks Empire Intranet; improves Survey Citizens activity; minor intel accuracy boost empire-wide.

name: Empire Intranet
description: Connect empire zones through a proprietary internal network. Unlocks Centralized Telecommunications; enables Free Internet plot.

name: Centralized Telecommunications
description: Tap into the communications infrastructure of target zones. Unlocks Surveillance Tap plot; passive intel on tapped zones; adds centralized-telecom effect.

name: Predictive Behavioral Modeling
description: Analyze citizen behavior patterns to anticipate dissent before it manifests. Improves loyalty report accuracy; early warning for revolt/protest events.

name: Pattern Recognition Systems
description: Automated analysis of surveillance data to identify foreign operatives by behavioral signature. Improves passive foreign agent detection; improves Counterintelligence Sweep effectiveness.

name: Deep Cover Protocols
description: Formalize methods for establishing and maintaining long-term agent cover identities. Unlocks Forge Identity Documents plot; increases cover identity duration.

name: Standardized Armaments Program
description: Equip empire agents with consistent, reliable weaponry. Small combat effectiveness bonus for all Troop agents.

name: Fortification Engineering
description: Develop methods for rapidly reinforcing zone defenses. Unlocks Fortify Zone plot; improves building durability in empire zones.

name: Advanced Weapons Development
description: Push the limits of conventional armament design. Significant combat effectiveness bonus for Troop agents.

name: Miniaturized Locomotion
description: Explore the engineering of small-scale propulsion and guidance systems. Unlocks Micro Flight Control.

name: Micro Flight Control
description: Develop precision guidance systems for small airborne platforms. Unlocks drone strike capability and improved Sabotage. Required for Pigeon Missile Barrage.

name: Avian Ordnance Integration
description: Explore the synergistic potential of biological carriers and precision munitions. Unlocks Pigeon Missile Barrage; adds missile-pigeons and pigeon-missiles effects.

name: Structural Optimization Research
description: Improve the empire's understanding of advanced construction materials. Construction speed improvement; building upkeep cost reduction.

name: Composite Materials Program
description: Develop advanced composite materials for specialized applications. Improved building durability.

name: Hyper-refractive Materials
description: Synthesize materials capable of manipulating light at previously impossible frequencies. Unlocks Hypno Disco Ball plot; adds hyperrefractive-materials effect.

name: Atmospheric Engineering Foundations
description: Develop the theoretical and practical basis for large-scale atmospheric intervention. Prerequisite for Blot Out the Sun.

name: Stratospheric Dispersal Systems
description: Engineer systems capable of deploying particulate matter at stratospheric altitudes with global coverage. Unlocks Blot Out the Sun plot.

name: Global Hydraulic Infrastructure Mapping
description: Comprehensively map and model the world's freshwater distribution systems. Prerequisite for water control.

name: Water Infrastructure Infiltration
description: Develop methods for accessing and controlling freshwater distribution nodes. Unlocks Control the World's Water Supply plot.

name: Basic Medical Protocols
description: Standardize medical care across empire facilities. Hospital healing rate improvement; improves First Aid activity effectiveness.

name: Epidemiological Studies
description: Research the spread and containment of disease in population centers. Improves outbreak management in empire zones. Zombie Plague Cure becomes visible.

name: Basic Avian Conditioning
description: Study and apply behavioral conditioning techniques to avian subjects. Improves Raven pet special actions. Required for Avian Ordnance Integration.

name: Advanced Pathogen Research
description: Push the boundaries of disease engineering and biological leverage. Unlocks Weaponized Pathogen plot. Required for Water Infrastructure Infiltration and Supersoldier Program.

name: Human Performance Optimization
description: Investigate the upper limits of human physical and cognitive capability. Unlocks Supersoldier Program. Catastrophic failure generates Zombie Plague.

name: Zombie Plague Cure
description: Develop a cure for the uncontrolled biological agent produced by a failed Supersoldier Program. Only becomes available after catastrophic failure. Slows plague spread and enables zone reclamation.

name: Nutritional Science Initiative
description: Research efficient methods of mass food production and citizen nutrition management. Improves citizen health baseline in empire zones.

name: Food Processing Research
description: Develop scalable food processing systems for empire-wide deployment. Unlocks Soylent Green plot; adds soylent-green-program effect.

name: Communications Strategy Framework
description: Establish a formal internal approach to citizen messaging and loyalty management. Improves EVIL Oratory activity; unlocks Inspiring Speech plot.

name: Narrative Control Systems
description: Develop methodologies for shaping public perception at scale. Improves Spread Conspiracy Theories; unlocks False Flag Operation.

name: Propaganda Department
description: Establish a dedicated internal organization for empire-wide influence operations. Unlocks Global Propaganda Campaign; passive perceived EVIL reduction per turn.

name: Behavioral Influence Research
description: Study and systematize the psychological levers of mass loyalty and compliance. Improves Send Ade and Free Internet surveillance backdoor. Required for Hypno Disco Ball.

name: Memetic Propagation Studies
description: Research the mechanics of idea spread through populations with an eye toward weaponization. Unlocks Disinformation Network plot; increases Conspiracy Theory spread rate.

name: Financial Systems Analysis
description: Study the economic structures of foreign zones to identify points of leverage. Improves Siphon Zone Accounts; zone economic output reports become more accurate.

name: Advanced Forgeries
description: Develop the capability to produce convincing fraudulent financial and legal documents. Unlocks Forge Trade Documents, improves Forge Identity Documents, unlocks Funny Money Printing Press; adds counterfeiter effect.

name: Market Manipulation Methodologies
description: Develop techniques for systematically distorting economic activity in target zones. Improves Funny Money Printing Press and The Biggest Tax plots.

name: Offshore Infrastructure Development
description: Establish empire financial assets in jurisdictions beyond the reach of foreign orgs. Passive money generation. Insulates empire from Global Financial Crash blowback.

name: Global Financial Crash
description: Engineer a coordinated collapse of world financial systems. Empire with Offshore Infrastructure active suffers reduced blowback; empire without it suffers alongside everyone else.

name: Internal Security Protocols
description: Establish baseline security practices across all empire operations. Small reduction in foreign agent detection difficulty in empire zones.

name: Encryption Protocols
description: Deploy advanced cryptographic systems across empire communications. Unlocks Encryption Protocols plot; adds encryption-protocols effect; significantly reduces enemy surveillance plot success rate.

name: Cyberwarfare Defense
description: Develop active countermeasures against foreign digital intrusion. Reduces enemy Computing-based plot effectiveness; passive detection of foreign Computing operations.

name: Enhanced Border Enforcement
description: Systematize the monitoring and control of agent movement across empire zone borders. Improved detection of foreign agents crossing in; travel time for foreign agents through empire territory increased.

name: Counterintelligence Operations Framework
description: Formalize the empire's approach to identifying, tracking, and neutralizing foreign operatives. Significantly improves Purge Foreign Agents; enables Counterintelligence Sweep standing operation; passive foreign agent identification in high-intel zones.
